title: ControlRoomBrief
description: GenAI-generated brief for operational staff in the control room regarding a forecasted congestion or anomaly.

zone_id.description: Identifier of the zone that triggered the brief.

summary_text.description: Concise summary of the crowd flow situation and risks.

recommended_action.description: Recommended immediate operational action (e.g., 'Deploy staff to gate 3 to redirect flow').

suggested_reroute_zone.description: Target zone or route ID where crowd flow should be redirected.

languages_needed.description: List of languages required for announcements/nudges based on crowd demographics.

generated_at.description: Timestamp indicating when the brief was generated.
